title: Delicate Algerian Beef Tomatoes Tagine
description: A floral and pillowy Algerian dish featuring beef tomatoes, this tagine is a nostalgic and jain-friendly option for dinner. It combines the flavors of broiled beef and tomatoes with aromatic spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Broil the tomatoes for 10 minutes on each side, until the skin is charred.
Remove the tomatoes from the oven and let them cool.
Peel the tomatoes and chop them into small pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cut beef to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the tagine for 20 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
